title: Mine Tools and Blocks MC
description: Adds New Ores, Useful things from materials, New interesting blocks And Other new things
body:
This mod contains both removed items and items that have a vanilla style.

This mod adds new ores, 1 of which is for measuring the nether world, and the other is 2x better than coal, which in generation have up to 48=Y

**Damage from Swords:**

Wood/Gold 4
Stone 5
Copper 5,5
Iron 6
Tungsten 6,5
Diamond 7
Gems 7,5

**Durability from Tools:**
Gold 32
Wood 59
Stone 131
Copper 190
Iron 250
Tungsten 695
Gems 1000
Diamond 1561

**Altitudes for Metal ores:**
Copper Y=96
Tungsten Y=40

**Removed Things:**
Ruby Ore, Crying Obsidian, Glowing Obsidian, Music calm 4, Music Dog, Stonecutter, Quiver and Studded Armor

**Backported Things:**
All Stripped Logs

**Debug Things:**
Double Stone Slab and Shrub

**Mentioning things from newer versions:**
Blue Dye, Black Dye, Copper Ore and Nether Gold Ore.


This mod has the generation of blocks located in old biomes from the **Modern Beta Forge** mod, such as blueberry bushes.

There is support for crafting in the crusher using the ore dictionary of some ores, such as Copper, Iron, Gold, Tungsten, Silver, Tin, Lead, Aluminum, Nickel, Zinc, Uranium, Platinum, Mithril, Bismuth, Manganese, Titanium, Cobalt, Palladium, Adamantium, Osmium, Niobium, Chromium, Iridium, Rhodium, and Molybdenum With Crushed Ores variation.

![IC2 and MTABMC crusher](https://i.imgur.com/LchCGDY.gif)

**Since version 1.0.7 this mod includes a configuration setting**

**Short Instruction**
![Other Craft Recipes](https://i.imgur.com/bnJ2b9M.png)
